pattern: Converting both clock times to minutes and rounding the window inward to 15-minute marks counts the fully-contained rounds.
hints: Convert each hh:mm to a total number of minutes since midnight.
If logout is earlier than login, add a full day of minutes to logout to account for crossing midnight.
Round the login time up to the next multiple of 15 and the logout time down to the previous multiple of 15; the count is max(0, (down - up) / 15).

edge_inputs.description: one full round inside the window
logout before login wraps past midnight
window too short for any full round
login one minute after a boundary loses that round
wrap with no full round due to misalignment

stress.description: random distinct hh:mm pairs across the day
